creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The package set for 8.1 contains a bad metacity package.  You will need 
to update your installed packages using an up-to-date ports tree.  When 
complete, you will have GNOME 2.30.2 with metacity-2.30.1_3, and this problem 
will go away.
